2021-22 North Dakota Fighting Hawks Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 6-25 (2-16, 10th in Summit MBB)

Coach: Paul Sather

PS/G: 70.3 (201st of 358)

PA/G: 78.8 (350th of 358)

SRS: -16.57 (345th of 358)

SOS: -5.26 (284th of 358)

ORtg: 100.9 (225th of 358)

DRtg: 113.2 (355th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +250000
